_meta.prices_source: Real models: refresh from LiteLLM's model_prices_and_context_window.json (the de-facto community price map) via `pnpm --filter @qaroom/moderator-agent cost:prices-hint`. There is no official OpenAI pricing API; embedding price is the published rate.
_meta.placeholder_note: openai:gpt-5.5-2026-04-23 is a pinned/future-dated id with NO public price in any source (OpenAI page, LiteLLM, tokencost). Its rates below are an explicit PLACEHOLDER you own — correct them from the OpenAI pricing page. The cost ledger is deterministic at rest precisely so the $ is reproducible; it is not live-fetched (would break determinism + offline CI, and no source knows this model).
_meta.estimate_note: DeepEval/DeepTeam/PyRIT call OpenAI through their own clients and expose no token counts in their output JSON, so the ledger $ is a pre-flight ESTIMATE, not a measured actual. The one path through our instrumented llm.py (runtime moderation) reports usage_metadata to OTel spans; the ledger records that as 'measured' when a run flushes it.
